overall.description: First-person exploration of a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment from a video game. The player examines a mystical golden statue with glowing purple orbs on a candlelit shelf, then pulls back to reveal the wider room with neon city lights visible through the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: shelf with ritual items and candles

events.description: camera begins ascending from lower shelf candles toward the upper shelf statue

agents.ego_description: slowly panning upward along a shelf filled with lit candles, books, and ceramic items, approaching a golden statue

entered.detail: multiple burning candles providing warm orange light on the lower shelf
stack of books with visible text 'WORLD AND SCOF' on the spine
large beige ceramic vessel with narrow neck
tall golden figure holding two glowing purple orbs, standing on upper shelf
decorative green skull with detailed facial features

segments.scene_description: The camera moves slowly up a candlelit shelf filled with mystical items. Warm candlelight illuminates books, a ceramic vase, and a green skull, while a golden statue holding glowing purple orbs becomes visible on the upper shelf.

events.description: camera begins orbiting clockwise around the golden statue to examine it from multiple angles
camera moves extremely close to the statue's glowing orbs before beginning to pull back

agents.ego_description: orbiting closely around the golden statue, examining its intricate details and the glowing purple orbs from various angles

segments.scene_description: The camera circles tightly around the golden statue, moving from a medium view to an extreme close-up of the glowing purple orbs. The green skull remains visible to the left while other shelf items fall out of frame, and the lighting shifts to emphasize the purple glow against the warm candlelight.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment living space with neon city view

events.description: camera pulls back dramatically from the statue to reveal the wider apartment room with neon lighting
game UI popup appears for 'INSTANTANO COFFEE' item inspection
camera turns toward and approaches the apartment exit door

agents.ego_description: moving through the cyberpunk apartment, examining the living space furnishings and approaching the exit door

entered.detail: modern curved sectional sofa with cushions
circular coffee table with items on top
tall rectangular floor lamp emitting warm light
large window with horizontal blinds showing dark exterior
colorful neon signs and blue-green lighting visible through the window
closed door with control panel, marked as locked

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a spacious cyberpunk apartment with a curved sofa, coffee table, and neon city lights glowing through the window. A game UI popup briefly appears for item inspection. The camera continues moving through the room toward a locked exit door, revealing the contrast between the warm interior candlelight and the cool neon exterior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with an intimate inspection of mystical artifacts and expands into a wide view of a neon-lit cyberpunk apartment. It begins by gliding up a candlelit shelf, passing books and a green skull until a golden statue holding glowing purple orbs comes into view. As the camera circles the statue, the perspective shifts into an extreme close-up that emphasizes the purple radiance against the warm candlelight while other objects fade from the frame. The scene then opens wide to reveal a spacious living area featuring a curved sofa and a coffee table, with a brief UI popup appearing during the transition. Finally, the camera moves through the room toward a locked exit door, highlighting the contrast between the warm interior glow and the cool neon city lights streaming through the windows.
